failedAssertions.reason: 55 pre-2021 stocks still have data starting after 2021-06-01. These expanded universe stocks only have ~148-152 rows from 2025-07/08 daily updates, never fully backfilled to 2021. No improvement from round 2.
54 pre-2021 stocks have fewer than 1000 daily kline rows (most have 147-152 rows). Same root cause as VAL-BACKFILL-001 — expanded universe stocks not historically backfilled.
34 of 201 post-2021 IPO stocks have data starting from 2025-07/08 instead of near their list_date. Day differences range 721-1595 days. 167 stocks are correctly backfilled.

214 of 1614 pre-2021 watchlist stocks missing early data (13.3%). 162 have no kline data at all, 52 have only recent data (~148 rows). Threshold: >10 = fail. fix-backfill-incomplete-stocks did not resolve these stocks.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that stock_basic.symbol (not ts_code) must be used for JOIN with klines.symbol_code since klines uses plain codes (000001) while stock_basic.ts_code uses exchange-suffixed codes (000001.SZ)
